title: Origins: Spore Lizard
description: Origin datapack that adds the Spore Lizard, a small critter that glows, and crawls, and climbs
body:
## 🌸 Spore Lizard 🌸
The Spore Lizard is a little critter often seen climbing on walls or tunneling.

❗❗ Requires Pekhui (for size power)

## ✨Powerlist✨

<details>
<summary>Expert Climber</summary>

You can climb walls, ceilings, through small spaces and up poles.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Liquid Body</summary>

You can crawl at any time and fit through tight tunnels.

Sneak to start crawling and jump to stop crawling.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Extend tongue</summary>

You can pick up items far away and do chip damage with your tongue.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Graceful fall</summary>

When landing on soft floor, you do not take any fall damage.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Green Thumb</summary>

While sneaking, you can bonemeal flora at the cost of some food.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Small</summary>

You're smaller than the average player.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Glow</summary>

You can glow at will.

Glow changes colors depending on health and environtment.

Change the color of the glow by using a dye in your offhand while sneaking. Reset the glow color by using a water bottle.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fragile</summary>

You have 3 less hearts of health than humans.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Tunneler</summary>

When not under the effect of a strength potion, you can only mine natural stone if there are 4 or more other natural stone blocks adjacent to it.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Syntesis</summary>

You can only regenerate health when around plants.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Weak Resolve</summary>

Any hit blocked with a shield will activate its cooldown.

</details>


## Modpack Development

<details>
<summary>Tags</summary>

- `blocks`
  - `nothing`: Blocks that are considered empty, like air.
  - `plants`: Blocks that enable Synthesis regeneration.
  - `poles`: Blocks that can be climbed vertically.
  - `soft`: Blocks that don't damage the origin when landing on them.
- `items`
  - `dyes`: Dyes that can be consumed to change color, do not edit without also changing the Glow power.
  - `shields`: Items that get disabled when the shield is hit.

</details>
